name: read-your-mind
description: SIOS — Social Intelligence OS: AI-powered social cognition and interpersonal strategy platform
author: SIOS Team

scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm run icon && node scripts/pack-electron.js
scripts.electron:installer: node scripts/pack-electron.js && electron-builder --pd dist-electron/SIOS-win32-x64 --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:all: npm run build && npm run icon && node scripts/pack-electron.js && electron-builder --pd dist-electron/SIOS-win32-x64 --win nsis --config electron-builder.yml
